reviews.comment:
Es un lugar en el que cada vez que voy a bahia paro a cargar combustible y desayunar. Excelente atención siempre. Muy limpio!

(Translated by Google)
It's a place I always stop at to refuel and have breakfast whenever I go to Bahia. Excellent service, always. Very clean!
